response:
```python
def main():
    import sys
    S = sys.stdin.readline().strip()
    rev_s = S[::-1]
    temp = rev_s + '#' + S
    lps = [0] * len(temp)
    
    for i in range(1, len(temp)):
        j = lps[i - 1]
        while j > 0 and temp[i] != temp[j]:
            j = lps[j - 1]
        if temp[i] == temp[j]:
            j += 1
        lps[i] = j
    
    lps_val = lps[-1]
    add_part = S[:len(S) - lps_val][::-1]
    print(S + add_part)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
```
